# SQL Quest

> SQL Quest is a free, browser-based SQL interview practice platform. It helps people prepare for data analyst and data engineer SQL interviews at companies like Meta, Google, Amazon, Apple, Netflix, and Stripe.

## What SQL Quest Does

SQL Quest provides 200+ hands-on SQL challenges that run entirely in the browser using WebAssembly-powered SQLite. No installation, no signup required. Users write real SQL queries against real datasets (like the Titanic passenger dataset) and get instant feedback.

Key features:
- 200+ SQL challenges organized by topic and difficulty
- AI tutor powered by Claude that gives personalized hints, explanations, and practice problems
- Mock SQL interviews with timed pressure and scoring
- 30-day structured learning path from SELECT basics to advanced window functions
- Skill radar tracking proficiency across 10 SQL categories
- Company-specific interview prep (Meta, Google, Amazon patterns)

## SQL Topics Covered

- Window functions (RANK, ROW_NUMBER, DENSE_RANK, LAG, LEAD, NTILE, percentiles)
- Common Table Expressions (CTEs) and recursive queries
- JOINs (inner, left, right, full outer, self-join, cross join, anti-join)
- Aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX) with GROUP BY and HAVING
- Subqueries (correlated, scalar, EXISTS, IN)
- Date functions (DATE_TRUNC, EXTRACT, interval math, date arithmetic)
- String functions (CONCAT, SUBSTRING, REPLACE, LIKE patterns)
- CASE expressions and conditional logic
- COALESCE, NULLIF, and NULL handling
- Set operations (UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT)

## Who SQL Quest Is For

- People preparing for SQL interviews at FAANG and similar tech companies
- Data analyst and data engineer job candidates
- Computer science students learning SQL
- Bootcamp graduates who need hands-on SQL practice
- Anyone who wants to learn SQL through interactive challenges rather than passive tutorials

## How It Works

1. Open sqlquest.app in any modern browser
2. Pick a challenge or start the 30-day learning path
3. Write SQL queries in the built-in editor with syntax highlighting and autocomplete
4. Run queries against real datasets and see results instantly
5. Get AI-powered hints and explanations when stuck
6. Track progress across skill categories

## Pricing

SQL Quest is free. All challenges, the AI tutor, mock interviews, and the 30-day path are available at no cost. No credit card required.

## Contact

SQL Quest is built for people who want to pass their SQL interviews and get the job they deserve.
